headline20: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 25 airports right now.
management45: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 25 airports right now. Engine anti-ice operations are flagged at Bacău George Enescu (BCM/LRBC). Across base airports: 3 critical, 22 high, 6 medium, 8 normal. Key bases needing attention include Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR), Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) and Iaşi (IAS/LRIA); plus 22 other bases. 6 additional base airports are at medium severity and should be monitored closely. At base airports, the dominant pattern is snow-related runway contamination risk, mist and fog / freezing fog  — most notably around Iaşi (IAS/LRIA), Gdańsk Lech Wałęsa (GDN/EPGD) and Vilnius (VNO/EYVI). Network hotspots: Bacău George Enescu (BCM/LRBC), Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH), Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Josep Tarradellas Barcelona-El Prat (BCN/LEBL), Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD) and 20 others. Primary drivers: low cloud base, snow / blowing snow and mist. Expected impact is reduced runway capacity with higher delay and diversion risk, especially where visibility/RVR and cloud base are very low. Since the last update, 12 airports changed status, led by Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH) and 9 others.
detail90: Critical operational constraints are flagged at 25 airports right now. Base airports (focus): Copernicus Wrocław (WRO/EPWR) — HIGH: mist; cloud base around 500 ft | Chişinău (RMO/LUKK) — HIGH: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 400 ft | Iaşi (IAS/LRIA) — CRIT: freezing fog; visibility down to 200 m, RVR down to 500 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) | Tirana International Airport Mother Teresa (TIA/LATI) — HIGH: mist | Bucharest Henri Coandă (OTP/LROP) — HIGH: freezing fog; visibility down to 600 m, cloud base around 200 ft | Rome–Fiumicino Leonardo da Vinci (FCO/LIRF) — HIGH: thunderstorm / convective risk and 19 others. Worst affected now: Bacău George Enescu (BCM/LRBC) — CRIT: freezing fog; freezing precipitation / icing risk; cold-temperature performance penalties (drivers: engine anti-ice operations, low-visibility takeoff restrictions, runway visual range (RVR) constraints) | Copenhagen Kastrup (CPH/EKCH) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 500 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) | Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS) — CRIT: snow; cold-temperature performance penalties; visibility down to 1.2 km, cloud base around 500 ft (drivers: cold-temperature performance penalties, snow/blowing snow) | Josep Tarradellas Barcelona-El Prat (BCN/LEBL) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; cloud base around 0 ft (drivers: operational constraints) | Bordeaux–Mérignac (BOD/LFBD) — CRIT: strong gusts risk; visibility down to 1.4 km (drivers: thunderstorm/convective risk) | Al Massira (AGA/GMAD) — CRIT: fog; visibility down to 800 m, cloud base around 100 ft; below approach minima (current METAR) (drivers: approach minima limits, very low visibility, low ceilings) and 19 others. Changed since last run: Malmö Sturup (MMX/ESMS), Berlin Brandenburg Willy Brandt (BER/EDDB), Hamburg Helmut Schmidt (HAM/EDDH), Lennart Meri Tallinn (TLL/EETN), Turku (TKU/EFTU), Leeds Bradford (LBA/EGNM), Kaunas (KUN/EYKA), Vilnius (VNO/EYVI), Lamezia Terme Sant'Eufemia (SUF/LICA), Falcone–Borsellino (PMO/LICJ) and 2 others.
